name: llm-wiki
description: Build and read transferable markdown-based person wikis through a CLI plus a read-only MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read transferable markdown wikis through MCP
interface.longDescription: Use a generated LLM wiki as a reusable context layer for agents. The plugin exposes a read-only MCP server for people, topics, timelines, sources, and statement search while the project CLI continues to handle building and updates.
defaultPrompt: Read the wiki index first, then jump into the most relevant topic page or search results before answering.
